2606.08036.title: GIScholarBench: Benchmarking LLM Overconfidence in GIS Research
2606.08036.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in academic research workflows, but scholarly tasks require high factual precision and therefore expose a key weakness: overconfidence. Here, overconfidence is defined behaviorally as the tendency to produce confident, assertive, and well-formatted outputs even when the underlying knowledge is incomplete or unverifiable, rather than as a calibration gap between stated confidence and accuracy. To examine this issue, we introduce GIScholarBench, a benchmark built from 10,865 papers published in 25 core GIScience journals between 2020 and 2025. The benchmark covers three tasks with increasing cognitive complexity: metadata retrieval, literature linking, and research direction generation. We evaluate Claude Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3, and ChatGPT 5.3 through their native web interfaces under real-world user-facing conditions. Results show consistent overconfidence across all tasks. In metadata retrieval, ChatGPT 5.3 achieves the highest accuracy, but all models still generate definitive titles and DOIs when predictions are wrong. In literature linking, Claude Sonnet 4.5 recovers the most references, but all models show a clear gap between top-ranked retrieval and longer citation lists, suggesting that references are extended beyond reliable retrieval capacity. In research direction generation, AI-generated directions show lower topic coverage, higher novel miss rates, and lower semantic diversity than real future-citing papers. These findings suggest that LLM overconfidence is task-invariant but takes different forms: factual overgeneration in retrieval, unreliable citation expansion in literature linking, and overconfidence in output completeness during research ideation.
2606.08036.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在學術研究工作流程中越來越常被使用，但學術任務需要高事實精確度，因此暴露出一個關鍵弱點：過度自信。在這裡，過度自信被行為上定義為即使基礎知識不完整或無法驗證，仍然產生自信、果斷且格式良好的輸出，而不是陳述的自信與準確性之間的校準差距。為了檢驗這個問題，我們介紹了GIScholarBench，這是一個基於2020年至2025年間在25本核心地理資訊科學期刊上發表的10,865篇論文建立的基準。該基準涵蓋了三個具有逐步增加的認知複雜性的任務：元數據檢索、文獻鏈接和研究方向生成。我們通過其原生網頁介面在真實的用戶面對條件下評估Claude Sonnet 4.5、Gemini 3和ChatGPT 5.3。結果顯示所有任務中均存在一致的過度自信。在元數據檢索中，ChatGPT 5.3達到了最高的準確率，但所有模型在預測錯誤時仍然生成確定的標題和DOI。在文獻鏈接中，Claude Sonnet 4.5恢復了最多的參考文獻，但所有模型在排名最高的檢索和較長的引用列表之間顯示出明顯的差距，這表明參考文獻的擴展超出了可靠檢索的能力。在研究方向生成中，AI生成的方向顯示出較低的主題覆蓋率、更高的新穎遺漏率以及較低的語義多樣性，與真正的未來引用論文相比。這些發現表明，LLM的過度自信是任務不變的，但表現出不同的形式：在檢索中事實過度生成，在文獻鏈接中不可靠的引用擴展，以及在研究構思過程中對輸出完整性的過度自信。
2606.08036.author: Zongrng Li et.al.
2606.08036.authors: Zongrng Li, Mingzheng Yang, Lei Zou, Hongxu Ma, Hao Tian, Siqi Zhou, Wenjing Gong, Kaili Zhang, Bingqian Chen, Mitch Zhang, Yifan Yang
